foundations.subject: surgery
foundations.reason: Embryological development and tracheoesophageal septation defects underlie atresia classification (Gross types)

foundations.subject: surgery
foundations.reason: Long-gap atresia requires delayed reconstruction techniques (Foker process, gastric pull-up)

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: Anastomotic leak is a major post-operative complication of EA repair

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: Post-repair GERD is nearly universal due to disrupted LES and esophageal dysmotility

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: Anastomotic stricture causing dysphagia is the most common long-term complication

integration: This postgraduate-level roadmap connects Esophageal Atresia across foundational sciences and clinical applications.
